trigger.description: Fires when a locksmith contact is tagged for referral outreach

steps.description: Mark contact as in active locksmith referral sequence

steps.subject: Referral partnership between our companies?
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

I'm Elliott with Axle Towing here in {{contact.city}}. I came across {{contact.company_name}} and wanted to reach out because locksmiths and towing companies run into each other's customers all the time.

When you're on a lockout call and the vehicle also needs a tow, or when we're on a roadside call and the driver needs a locksmith -- it makes sense to have a go-to partner to refer.

I'd like to propose a simple mutual referral arrangement. No contracts, no fees. Just two local companies sending each other business when the situation fits.

Would you be open to a quick call or text to see if this makes sense for both of us?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 0 - Initial intro proposing mutual referral partnership

steps.subject: Re: Referral partnership between our companies?
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Just circling back on my note about a referral partnership between Axle Towing and {{contact.company_name}}.

Other partners have told us the simplest approach works best -- keep a few of each other's cards in the trucks and make intros on-site when the situation comes up. No tracking systems or complicated processes.

On our end, we cover the entire Phoenix metro with a 30-minute average response time, so your referrals would get fast, reliable service. We'd love to return the favor whenever our customers need locksmith help in {{contact.city}} or anywhere nearby.

Worth a quick conversation?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 4 - Follow-up with specifics on how partnerships work

steps.subject: Quick note - towing referrals
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Last note from me on this. I know you're busy running {{contact.company_name}}, so I'll keep it short.

If you ever have a customer who needs a tow, we'd appreciate the referral. And we're happy to return the favor -- when our customers need a locksmith in {{contact.city}}, we'd send them your way.

No need to reply if the timing isn't right. Just keep us in mind.

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 10 - Final friendly follow-up, low pressure
